title: Івасик-телесик. Народна казка
author: Івасик-телесик. Народна казка
description: "Ivasyk-Telesyk" (Ukrainian: «Івасик-Телесик») is a Ukrainian folk tale in the family of magical tales, fables, or fairy tales. According to Ukrainian folklorist Petro Lintur, the story of Telesyk is popular in Ukraine.
shortDescription: "Ivasyk-Telesyk" (Ukrainian: «Івасик-Телесик») is a Ukrainian folk tale in the family of magical tales, fables, or fairy tales.
